title: “Latte Nobile”: a productive model for high quality milk and dairy products
description: A practice abstract describing an organic sheep farming model in Sardinia that integrates high-biodiversity semi-natural pastures and minimal external inputs to produce high-quality raw milk cheese. The ‘Latte nobile’ model emphasizes pasture-based diets, flavor-rich products, technical assistance, product traceability, and branding to secure higher prices for farmers.
